algorithm.name: Breadth-first search
algorithm.description: Shortest paths by hop count from the Start vertex. A clean main loop calls interactive helpers; long notes explain each line. Run it on the Weighted digraph canvas.

algorithm.name: Floyd–Warshall
algorithm.description: All-pairs shortest paths via a dynamic-programming distance matrix — watch the table fill as each vertex is allowed as an intermediate. Run it on the Weighted digraph canvas.

canvas.name: Weighted digraph
canvas.description: A small 5-vertex weighted directed graph (A…E) to run algorithms against.
